name: Dulse Fried Oyster Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ingredients for the three mixtures separately and set aside.
2. Line a baking sheet with absorbent towels. Heat oil to 350°F in a medium-sized saucepan, about 5 minutes over medium heat.
3. Dredge mushrooms in flour mixture. Shake off excess flour and dunk in the liquid mixture.
4. Roll the mushrooms in the breadcrumb mixture.
5. Fry in the hot oil for 45 seconds on each side until golden brown.
6. Drain and serve.
